# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

- resources:
  - type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
    name: my-service-account
    properties:
      accountId: my-service-account
      displayName: My Service Account
      project: $(ref.project.projectId)

  - type: iam.v1.serviceAccountKey
    name: my-service-account-key
    properties:
      serviceAccountId: $(ref.my-service-account.email)
      keyAlgorithm: KEY_ALG_REGULAR
      privateKeyType: TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
  
  - type: gcp-types/compute-v1:instances
    name: my-instance
    properties:
      zone: us-central1-a
      machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          type: PERSISTENT
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: gcp-types/compute-v1:images/debian-9-stretch-v20200908
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: global/networks/default
          accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      serviceAccounts:
        - email: $(ref.my-service-account.email)
          scopes:
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
